feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Configuration of Dynamic Sender Email in Output Parameter Determination_Billing Documents
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

As part of the process for sending billing documents to customers, we would like to configure the sender's email address based on the Company Code/Sales Organization issuing the billing document.

In the "Email Settings" step within the "Output Parameter Determination" application, we are currently unable to set a dynamic email address that varies according to the sending Company Code/Sales Organization 

With the current configuration, a single default email address is used for all Company Codes and Sales Organizations, and there is no option to define dynamic email addresses.

Can we achieve this requirement by implementing a Business Add-In (BAdI) ? If possible, could you please help us identify the appropriate BAdI and how to proceed ? 

Thank you for your help. 

Best regards,

entry.title: Limit sales order partner function number - taken only from customer
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I've got a question regarding Partner functions: I want to limit the partner function number possible list to be taken from customer.

Example partner function CP - contact person. Current setting (I've added origin E, but it's not working as I thought, previously it was empty):

Currently I only have 1 contact person assigned to this customer:

And this number is assigned as default to the sales order in order header -> partner tab:

Yet I can go and change this number to another one and save such sales order:

Is there a standard configuration to block such action and allow only numbers that are assigned to the customer?

entry.title: Error while Creating BP for Customer - "BP role JD10 X does not Exist" in SAP SD
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

I am trying to create customer in Tcode BP in my SAP SD project but whenever i try to select my Grouping JD10 and then select Create in BP role i.e JD10 i get error that "BP role JD10 X does not Exist".

Screenshots of the required settings i am attaching for your easy understanding: 

Step 1: Created Customer Account group, created no range and then assigned it to CAGs.

Customer Acc Group Jd10/20/30

Step 2: Create Business Partner

 

Like wise i did for all my Role groupings i.e JD20 and JD30

I have kept same no range for both Customer acc groups and BP role groupings i.e J1,J2,J3

Step 3: Settings for customer integration in master data syncronization

Step 4: Partner determination procedure

I dont know where i am lagging behind but its not letting me to create customer in BP. I know its a bit long essay type description but i really want it to be solved. I will be very helpful if somebody can assist me in solving this problem.

Thanks,

Chirag Vaghela.

entry.title: DCD is nothing
entry.content: In my S/4 system, in tcodes VKM* and table UKM_DCD_ATTR and fiori app “Manage Documented Credit Decisionscan” all can show the blocked SO，but in tcode UKM_MY_DCD is nothing. I want UKM_MY_DCD to show the blocked SO. How to do it? Who can teach me? More information in the attached image. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: VFX3 Job Scheduling for Billing Release SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you help how VFX3 Job Scheduling for Billing Release in SAP S4HANA version 1909? And a report sending to e-mail listing

entry.title: Change confirmed delivery date in VA02
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Is it possible to set in customizing whether it is allowed to postpone an already confirmed delivery date to a sales order item?

If so, can the extent to which a date may be postponed also be defined?

Thank you!

entry.title: Sales office Business place wise in Billing document VF01
entry.content: Any one can advise the complete configuration to determine the business place, sales office-wise.

entry.title: Bill from Gujarat and Dispatch from Rajasthan
entry.content: I have an office in Gujarat and a manufacturing plant in Rajasthan. I want to sell goods to customers, billing them from my Gujarat GSTIN (business location) while shipping the products from my Rajasthan plant. How can I set this up in SAP SD?

entry.title: Document 90000049 saved (no journal entry generated)
entry.content:
hello, when i create the billing document with reference to a Goods Delivery document, it got saved easily and billing document number generated successfully in VF01, but it is not creating the accounting document automatically.

when i try to create the accounting document via "release to accounting" this billing document in VF02 screen, now system is showing the error "Company code 1710 requires you to enter a tax jurisdiction code".

I've checked the VKOA screen but unable to track what exactly the issue which is not creating the Accounting document automatically via VF01.

Please guide me in detail and exact.

i kindly request @faheem4work , @Chuma , @AlbertMolnar , @DominikTylczyn  & others, please guide me about it quick. its a little urgent for me to resolve and practice, regards.

entry.title: Product Allocation : Using Mask and Selective Restrictions
entry.content:
Hi All

We are in S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01 but are currently not using Advance ATP. We would like to use product allocation but are facing the following challenges. Would appreciate expertise from the forum members:

a. If we have a Product Allocation Structure assigned to a procedure and which is assigned to the material master, the system expects maintenance for all possible combinations.

 - E.g We have a customer order that can be fulfilled from two different plants. Plant 1 has a constraint that we have set which allows a set quantity that can be delivered for the constraint period. We defined a Info Structure based on Sales Org / Plant / Material. However, we find that if we maintain constraints for one plant, the system also expects us to maintain allowed quantities per period for other plants as well. If not, the system forces the confirmed quantity to zero since a plan is not found for the other plant. How do we handle this situation ?

b. We have a product allocation procedure that is based on Sales Org / Customer / Material. However, we only want to constraint the supply for some customers. When we maintain the constraint for these selected customers, the system forces the other customers to have a zero confirmation since there is no restriction for the other customers that has been maintained. This would mean a maintenance of allocations for all customers ? That would be very difficult to do if we have a restriction for only some customers. 

c. We defined a procedure with two info structures and a mask. When we maintain the plan data, it does not allow to put in a # or a * in the characteristics. Hence, if we have to maintain a restriction for one sales organization, as an example and want to indicate that all other sales organizations can have any stocks that they want, we are not able to get allocation to support this request.  Info structures that are defined in a procedure as steps work in a "AND" logic so it is a challenge if want only the applicable info structure to be read. 

d. When the Plan type is maintained, it shows an option of "0" column. What is the function of this option ?

Would appreciate inputs from experts.

Regards

Rohit Zalani

entry.title: MD04 and VA33 show different dates
entry.content: I created a sales scheduling agreement using VA31, and the dates on the Forecast delivery schedule are 6/4 and 6/5, but the dates found in Stock/Requirements (MD04) are all 6/3 (today). I would like to ask how to set the date to be consistent.

entry.title: Disable Standard Delete Button in VA02 for All Users – Custom Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi ,

I wanted to share a quick solution I implemented to disable the standard Delete button in VA02 for all users.

 Solution

Main Program: MV45AF0C

INCLUDE MV45AF0C_CUA_MODIFIZIEREN .

To handle this, I added a small enhancement in the program: MV45AF0C_CUA_MODIFIZIEREN.
Here’s how I disabled the delete (LOES) button using CUA_EXCLUDE:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ENHANCEMENT 1 ZZENH_MV45AF0C_CUA_MODIFIZER2. "active version
IF sy-uname NE '  '  AND us_status EQ 'U' AND syst-tcode EQ 'VA02'.
READ TABLE cua_exclude WITH KEY 'LOES' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
CHECK sy-subrc NE 0.
APPEND 'LOES' TO cua_exclude.
ENDIF.
ENDENHANCEMENT.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Feedback is always welcome!

Regards 

Gurcharan Singh

entry.title: Sales order availability check
entry.content:
We have a strange issue where sales order quantity is not getting confirmed for few sales order line items.

We have a delivery job setup which is causing partial deliveries created for few items as few line items are not confirmed automaically.

We want confirmed quantity to be detemined for all the line items at the same time so single delivery is created.

 

Even the Schedule line configuration(VOV5) does not have the availability check enabled, still we are facing this.

 

Also this is not happening for all the sales order, its random as pee our initial understanding.

any pointers will be really helpful.

 

We have enough stock and manual retrigger of availibility check in VA02 is solving the problem.

 

PS- Our system was recently upgraded to S4 2023 and seems we are facing it post the upgrade.

 

Regards

Akshay

entry.title: Incorrect delivery status "complete" after partial delivery for consig fillup, ABC- storage location
entry.content:
I have implemented ABC storage location for main item category below are settings same for sub item category. Also are listed below the schedule line item category. it is consignment fill-up scenario

1. Upon partially delivering the order line item show as fully delivered

2. Main item is showing open qty 10 where it should be only 1 as that s the open qty. 

Main item category 

respective schedule line item category 

 

Sub Item category 

respective schedule line item category 

Order details below we can see delivered is short but status is complete

 

VA05 open qty issue

entry.title: commodity code from GTS system to SAP system
entry.content: we have a requirement to develop new Z FIELD of commodity code which holds 10 digits commodity code from GTS system. do we have any user exit or BADI for this enhancement.

entry.title: EDI - Sales Orders
entry.content:
Hello 

How do others do EDI for SO? 

Our current setup is orders from customers go to middle ware company and then get posted into SAP. 

If there are any issues with SO (material # incorrect etc) the SO wont be posed into SAP and remains in the middle ware company until date matches. 

Is there a way that SO, even with incorrect data, can go into SAP and be held for review before being created as a SO? 

Wondering how others deal with this issue?

Adam

entry.title: Customer Acknowledgement of goods received after booking sales invoice (VF01)
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from client in which once goods are dispatched & sales invoice is booked (VF01), client wants to have a process of performing acknowledgement that the customer has received the goods.

I am aware of the process of POD as seen in the below blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-members/pod-proof-of-delivery/ba-p/13220429

But in POD case, sales invoice is not generated if POD is yet to be completed.

The client wants the sales invoice & Einvoicing to be generated & only after that should there be a customer acknowledgement step purely for reporting purposes.

 

Is there a standard way in SAP to only perform acknowledgement (similar to VLPOD) after VF01?

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: TAX CAN NOT DISPALY IN SEVICE ORDER (SVO)
entry.content:
HELLO GUYS 

I want to create SVO (SEVICE ORDER) ,but i cannt found tax of this country by fiori.

for example tax code :zt07
I try to add this tax in the list , but i cannt find . 

Price logic is simmilar with SO .

how to solve this issue ?
kindly.

entry.title: Value Mismatch in Order and Invoice value due delivery split
entry.content:
I have sales order with one line item having 20 Qty later 3 deliveries are created (8 Qty, 8Qty, 4 Qty), in sales order Condition type (Handling cost) having calculation type B-Fixed Amount is entered manually (Let say 95 EUR), Now all three deliveries  are combined in single invoice now system added 95 EUR to each line item (Order Net Value = 100 (Base value) +95 (Handling cost) = 195 EUR, Invoice value 100+95+95+95= 385 EUR).

Business want in invoice also Handling cost should come only once, How to achieve this ?

entry.title: Create Billing Plan for a Sales Order Item through a Custom Program
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We have a requirement to create Billing Plan (with multiple line items) for a Sales Order Item by passing Billing Date and Billing Value using an excel file. 

I tried using below FMs in the given sequence but am unable to achieve the required results:

1. BILLING_SCHEDULE_GENERATE followed by BILLING_SCHEDULE_SAVE

2. BILLING_SCHEDULE_MAINTAIN followed by BILLING_SCHEDULE_SAVE

My observations:

1. BILLING_SCHEDULE_GENERATE and BILLING_SCHEDULE_MAINTAIN was not able to fill required fields like FPLTR, etc. in the FPLT_NEW local table. 

2.  BILLING_SCHEDULE_SAVE directly inserts the database table FPLT with the values passed by the program in FPLT_NEW internal table. This leaves the database table FPLT with empty values in required columns.

3. All the 3 mentioned FMs are not released for customer use.

4. I tried using BDC and it creates the entries as required with all the required columns. This is because the standard VA02 transaction creates/derives the values of the required columns by itself using the standard program.

My concern:

1. Since BDC is not a preferred solution over using standard FMs, I am not sure if this approach should be followed.

2. The FMs are not released for customers and also there is a direct insert on database table FPLT based on the data passed by the custom program which looks incorrect. 

I am looking for your expert advice in this matter. Thanks in advance!
